posts.title: 「君の名は。」の糸守湖のモデルになった諏訪湖が見える立石公園に行ってみた！ Tateishi Park, overlooking Lake Suwa, the model for Lake Itomori in "Your Name." #君の名は #CapCut

Finally! seeing the iconic “Your Name / 君の名は”(Kimi no Na Wa) staircase in Tokyo ! 🗼✨❤️ 📍 Suga Shrine, Sugacho, Shinjuku City 📍 Yotsuya Station, Shinjuku City #yournameanime #japan #shinjuku #fyp #foryoupage

Mt. Omuro is a dormant, grass-covered volcano in Izu, Japan, whose shape is widely considered to have inspired the comet crater in Makoto Shinkai's anime film, "Your Name".  #mtomuro #yourname #fyp #foryoupage #anime
IRL Kimi no Nawa (Your Name) Cafe at the National Art Center in Roppongi #tokyotravel #yourname #kiminonawa #roppongi #animeirl

the real-life Itomori from Your Name / 君の名は 📍Lake Suwa, Nagano Fun fact: Director Makoto Shinkai grew up in Nagano Prefecture, and this landscape left a deep mark on his work, inspiring the iconic village! For those not driving, it’s a 30-40 mins hike uphill to this viewpoint. The lake itself is huge, and this exact viewpoint is at Tateishi Park for the best view! If you are going to wait for sunset (for that twilight or katawaredoki moment), bring an umbrella, snacks and a jacket! #yourname #itomori #kiminonawa #lakesuwa

Finally seeing the iconic Your Name / 君の名は (Kimi no Na Wa) staircase in Tokyo! 🥹⛩️🇯🇵💖 Featured in the film’s unforgettable final scene, this spot is a must-visit for any anime lover or if you want to remake the final romantic scene 🥹. Add it to your Tokyo bucket list! 🗼✨📍 Suga Shrine, Yotsuya 📌 Save this for your next trip! #YourName #KimiNoNaWa #TokyoAnimeSpots #animereallife

We have another special live action video this time! Of course, we had to pick the most famous anime pilgrimage location of all time! The stairs from the very popular anime ‘Your Name’! This turned out to probably be my favourite live action anime to shoot and one I had planned for a very long time! 📍Location - Suga Shrine | Just a short walk from Yotsuya station, Suga shrine is a must visit for all anime fans travelling to Tokyo!  Where do you want to see the next live action anime adaptation? Make sure to leave a comment on where we should go next! Make sure to also follow us on Instagram and TikTok to stay up to date with our latest adventures — 今回はまたまたスペシャルな実写動画をお届けします！ やっぱり選ぶなら、アニメ聖地巡礼の中でも“史上最も有名”と言っても過言ではないあの場所—— 大ヒットアニメ『君の名は。』のあの階段です！ 今回の実写再現は、これまで撮影してきた中でもおそらく一番のお気に入り。そして、ずっと前から温めてきた企画でもありました！ 📍ロケ地：須賀神社 四ツ谷駅から徒歩すぐ。東京を訪れるすべてのアニメファンにとって、外せない聖地です！ 次はどのアニメの実写再現を見てみたいですか？ ぜひコメントで、次に行ってほしい場所を教えてください！ 最新の冒険をお見逃しなく！ InstagramとTikTokのフォローもよろしくお願いします！ @MyAnimePassport #君の名は #YourName #AnimePilgrimage #AnimeInRealLife #japantrip

Finally made it to the real-life location from Your Name. In Mitsuha’s hometown,watching that same twilight moment from the film. When reality and anime overlap,everything goes quiet. Some scenes are worth seeing in person. #YourName#KimiNoNaWa#AnimePilgrimage#AnimeLocation#JapanTravel#JapanScenery#CinematicJapan#JapanAesthetic#TravelTok#AnimeVibes
